allow: Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('eu5-tbd/data/events.json',encoding='utf-8'\)\); print\(f'events: {len\(d.get\(\\"events\\",[]\)\)}'\); print\('keys:', list\(d.get\('events',[{}]\)[0].keys\(\)\) if d.get\('events'\) else 'empty'\)")
